headline: TTM Technologies, Rogers, and Zebra Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after yields tumbled as the Trump Administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
